title: Noah Lucas homepage v031 resume-aligned copy
changeSummary: Aligns the identity line, thesis, investments statement, and footer with the current 2026 Product Executive resume variant.
Rewrites the Sift, Anduril, Pendulum, Serve, Postmates, Expedia, and S&P work cards with resume-grounded role titles, dates, outcomes, and operating language.
Preserves the v030 rounded glass pane, glass controls, employer logo behavior, images, and responsive layout.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720 and 390x844.
checks: Resume-aligned identity line and thesis render without horizontal overflow.
Mobile employer proof strip remains Sift, Anduril Industries, Serve Robotics, and Postmates.
Desktop retains the full seven-employer strip and the v030 rounded pane treatment.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
